pan-fried-turmeric-bread-kubez-kimaaj.name: Pan-fried Turmeric Bread (kubez Kimaaj)
instructions: Put 1½ tsp. fast-acting (instant) dried yeast, 1 Tbsp. granulated sugar, and ¾ cup plus 2 Tbsp./200 ml lukewarm water into a small bowl and set aside for 5 minutes, or until the mixture starts to bubble.

Put 3 cups/13 oz./370 g all-purpose flour, heaping 1⁄4 tsp. ground turmeric, 2 Tbsp. sunflower oil, and 1 tsp. salt into the bowl of a stand mixer with the dough hook attachment in place. Mix on a low speed for 1 minute, just to combine, then add the yeast mixture. Work on low speed for 2 minutes to bring everything together, then increase the speed to medium and continue to mix for 3 minutes, until the dough is soft and elastic.

Tip the dough on to a clean work surface and bring together to form a ball. Grease the bowl with a bit of oil, then return the dough to the bowl. Turn it a couple of times so that it’s completely coated in the oil, then cover the bowl with a clean kitchen towel and let rest somewhere warm for 1–1½ hours, or until the dough has doubled in size.

Cut the dough into 8 equal pieces (2½ oz./70 g each) and roll each out into a 6"/15-cm circle. After all the pieces are rolled out, cover them with a slightly damp kitchen towel and let them rest again for 20 minutes.

Place a large nonstick frying pan over medium heat, and when hot, dry-fry the bread for about 6 minutes, turning a few times to help the bread puff up. Put the cooked bread onto a large kitchen towel, well spaced out, while you repeat the same with the rest of the dough circles. Place another kitchen towel over the cooked bread and leave it to cool down slightly, to keep the bread moist and pillowy.
Serve warm, or wrap well and store in the freezer.

pancake-recipe-lezzet.name: Pancake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup of water (gerektic can be added slightly more)
Wheat flour (more fiber and hearty option)
Corn flour (can be mixed into half-half, gives a light crispy texture)
Ilik milk (makes the nozzle softer and tasty)

Fresh onions or fesle (for those who want different tastes)

The dough's inner yogurt,it provides a softer and durable eyeing.

instructions: 1. Combine flour, baking powder, water, olive oil and salt in a container.
2. Mix the ingredients thoroughly and from the purulent area of a dough.
3. Blend crushed white cheese, egg white, and thin chopped yeast in a separate mixing container.

pancakes-without-sugar-argiro.name: Pancakes Without Sugar

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 tsp crystalline stevia or other Sweetening Matter
1⁄4 cup light milk cream or low fat yogurt
11⁄2 tsp crystalline stevia or other Sweetening Matter
1⁄4 cup light milk cream or low fat yogurt

instructions: In a small pot, melt the butter over low heat and set aside the temperature. We want the butter to be lukewarm.
Shake the flour in a bowl, along with the baking powder.
Add the sweetener and salt and mix with a spoon to combine our ingredients.
We do a puddle in the middle of our mix.
Add the egg, melted lukewarm butter and cream.
Alternatively, replace light cream with low fat yogurt.
Mix the porridge with the wire very well to homogenize our mixture.
Allow the mixture to stand for 15 minutes.

pani-popo.name: Pani Popo
instructions: Arrange rolls in a 9x13-inch baking dish, cover the dish with plastic wrap, and let rise until doubled in size, about 30 minutes.

Combine 14 ounces water, coconut milk, and sugar in a saucepan. Whisk remaining water and cornstarch together in a small bowl. Bring coconut milk mixture to a boil, whisk in cornstarch mixture, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens, about 3 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove plastic wrap from rolls.

Bake rolls in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Pour coconut sauce over rolls until at least half of each roll is covered in sauce. Return rolls to oven; continue baking until rolls are golden brown, 5 to 10 minutes more. Cool in the baking dish, 3 to 5 minutes, before serving warm.

panko-breaded-chicken-thighs-recipe-come.name: Panko Breaded Chicken Thighs Recipe
panko-breaded-chicken-thighs-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo empanizados con panko

ingredients.item: 8  muslos de pollo ((sin piel y deshuesados, si prefieres))
1 cdote of sweet or smoked peppermint
Vegetal oil to fry (sufficient to submerge thighs (about 1 liter))

instructions: Cleans chicken thighs by withdrawing any excess fat. Saxony with salt, pepper, powder garlic and peppermint. Let rest 20-30 minutes to absorb flavors.
Coloca la harina en un recipiente.
Bate los huevos en un plato hondo.
Fold panko into a large plate and, if you wish, add dried herbs or parmesan cheese.
Fits every thigh through the flour, making sure you cover completely. It's an excess.
Dig them into the whipped egg till it's well covered.
Finally, cover with panko, pressurizing slightly so that the empanization will stick perfectly.

In a profound frying pan or frying pan, heats up enough vegetable oil at 180 been 3 been (177 been 3). Use a kitchen thermometer to secure the right temperature and if it's too low, the chicken will absorb more fat and if it's too high, the panko will be burned before the chicken's cooked.
Put your thighs into hot oil and avoid overloading the frying pan (frying as necessary).
Fry each piece for 6-8 minutes, sometimes turning it up, till panko's golden and chicken's well-cooked (internal temperature 75-3 or 74-3).
Remove the oil thighs and place them onto a grid or absorbing paper to remove excess fat.

paradise-date-marmalade-recipe-lezzet.name: Paradise Date Marmalade Recipe

ingredients.item: 500 grams of mature paradise hurma (non-soft and sweet)

instructions: 1. Wash scrapes and peel off the bark and peel off the shells.
2. Small cubes.
3. Take chopped palms in the pot.
4. U add powder sugar and water to your car.
5. Bake 15–20 minutes by stirring intermediates.
6. Blender or hand made pure with sputtering.
7. Adding the lemon juice and boil it in a minute more jealous fire; marmelate the consistency.
8. Fill the hot marmeleon into clean and dry jars.
9. Reverse the jars leave to cool and wealth.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

parmesan-bread-pudding-with-broccoli-rab.name: Parmesan Bread Pudding With Broccoli Rabe And Pancetta

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper plus more

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and red pepper flakes. Stir until garlic is softened, about 30 seconds. Add broccoli rabe; sea-son with salt and pepper. Cook, tossing, until wilted, about 2 minutes; let cool slightly.

Meanwhile, whisk eggs, milk, 2 teaspoons salt, and 1/2 teaspoons pepper in a large bowl to blend. Add broccoli rabe mixture, bread, and 1/2 cup Parmesan; toss to combine. Transfer to a 1-1/2-qt. baking dish. Top with pancetta and remaining 2 tablespoons Parmesan.
Bake pudding until puffed, browned in spots, and set in the center, 45-55 minutes.

passover-double-chocolate-almond-torte.name: Passover Double Chocolate Almond Torte
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Grease a 9-inch springform pan and dust with 1/2 teaspoon unsweetened cocoa powder.
Melt chopped chocolate squares and butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth, 5 to 10 minutes.
Whisk egg yolks and vanilla extract together in a large bowl.
Gradually whisk chocolate and butter mixture into egg yolk mixture until well blended.
Beat egg whites in a separate bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form. Gradually beat sugar into egg whites until sugar dissolves and egg whites hold stiff peaks.
Fold 1/3 of the egg white mixture into chocolate mixture. Gently fold in remaining egg white mixture until just blended and batter is smooth and fluffy.
Spread batter evenly into prepared springform pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until sides begin to pull away from pan and top is set in center, about 25 minutes.
Let torte cool in pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes before removing the sides of pan.

Place chocolate chips into a microwave-safe bowl and heat in microwave on full power for 1 minute. Stir the chips. Continue to heat in 15-second intervals, stirring after each time, until the chocolate chips have melted and are warm and smooth. Do not overheat.
Drizzle melted chocolate chips onto torte. Sprinkle crushed almonds and a dusting of confectioners' sugar and 1/2 teaspoon unsweetened cocoa powder, or as needed, onto the torte before serving..

pasta-primavera.name: Pasta Primavera

ingredients.prep: preferably haricots verts, trimmed, cut into 1" pieces
plus more fresh basil leaves for serving
pistachios, or walnuts), chopped if large (optional)

instructions: Cook 1 lb. short pasta (such as gemelli) in a large pot of boiling salted water 1 minute less than package directions. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid; set cooked pasta aside.

Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in same pot over medium. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, and ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring often, just until fragrant, 1–2 minutes. Add 8 oz. asparagus, trimmed, cut into 1" pieces, and 4 oz. green beans, preferably haricots verts, trimmed, cut into 1" pieces, and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are softened slightly, about 4 minutes.

Add 1½ pints grape tomatoes, ¾ cup frozen peas, and ⅔ cup heavy cream and bring to a gentle simmer. Cook, stirring often, until a few tomatoes begin to burst, 2–3 minutes. Add 2 oz. Parmigiano-Reggiano, finely grated (about 1 cup), 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, 1 Tbsp. balsamic vinegar, 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest, and reserved pasta and toss, adding pasta cooking liquid a little at a time as needed, until cheese is melted and a glossy sauce forms. Remove pasta from heat, stir in ½ cup finely chopped basil, and season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper.

Divide pasta among shallow bowls. Garnish with basil leaves and ⅓ cup toasted nuts (such as pine nuts, pistachios, or walnuts), chopped if large, if desired.
Editor’s note: Head this way for more of our best pasta recipes →

pasta-salad-in-a-jar.name: Pasta Salad In A Jar

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook tortellini in the boiling water until they float to the top, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain water. Place in the refrigerator to cool, about 15 minutes.
Layer pesto, cucumbers, tomatoes, onions, tortellini, and mache into the canning jar; season with salt and pepper.

pasta-with-avocado-argiro.name: Pasta With Avocado

ingredients.item: 1 ripe avocado cut into pieces and sprinkled with a little lemon not to tan
1 ripe avocado cut into pieces and sprinkled with a little lemon not to tan

instructions: Soak the bread in water first.
Then squeeze it and make it crumbs in the blender.
Add the nuts, garlic and oil and grind all the ingredients together.
Fill in some of the boiling pasta to make a dense sauce.
Instead of oil we can add some tahini.
Boil the pasta, drain and hand them over to the dishes.
Add the sauce over and garnish with chopped avocado and finely ground walnut.
Pour with olive oil and rub pepper.

pasta-with-chorizo-and-chickpeas.name: Pasta With Chorizo And Chickpeas

ingredients.item: Fresh mexican chorizo or hot italian sausage
Finely grated parmesan and lemon zest

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shallots and cook, stirring often, until beginning to brown, about 3 minutes. Add chorizo; cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through, 5–7 minutes.

Add tomato paste and red pepper flakes to skillet and cook, stirring, until paste darkens, about 1 minute. Add broth; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened, 15–20 minutes. Add chickpeas and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.
Add pasta and ½ cup pasta cooking liquid to sauce. Cook, stirring and adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce thickens and coats pasta, about 3 minutes.
Serve pasta topped with parsley, if using, Parmesan, and lemon zest.

pasta-with-salmon-and-tomatoes-in-cream-.name: Pasta With Salmon And Tomatoes In Cream Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Drain.

Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat while spaghetti is cooking and cook salmon and garlic until salmon is lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Add tomatoes and basil, season with salt and pepper, and cook for 3 minutes. Pour in cream and simmer over low heat until flavors are well combined and salmon is cooked through, about 10 minutes. Serve sauce over cooked pasta.

pastry-crust.name: Pastry Crust
instructions: Mix flour and salt together in a large bowl. Cut in butter using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles fine cornmeal. Pour in water slowly; knead dough into a firm ball.

Pour in additional water as needed if dough is too dry or additional flour if too moist. Divide batter into equal halves. Roll out dough halves into rounds on a lightly floured work surface using a lightly floured rolling pin to desired thickness.
Press one round into the bottom of a 9-inch pie pan. Use the other round as a top crust or for a separate bottom crust. Bake according to desired filling instructions.

patties-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Patties In The Air Fryer
instructions: Start with the filling: Cook the shrimp kernel in salt-tempered water (500 ml), then drain and reserve the shrimp and broth.
Dissolva a sopa de marisco no caldo e reserve.

In a pot, melt the margarine, add the onion and garlic finely chopped and let it saute until the onion is golden. Sprinkle with flour, always stirring, then water with the mixture of shellfish soup slowly and keep moving until you run out of clumps. Then add the shrimp kernel, season with nutmeg, salt and pepper, remove from the fire, add chopped corianders, lay in a bowl and let it cool.

The mass: Take a pot to the fire with the water, the pinch of salt and the lemon peel and the butter, and let it boil. Add the flour in rain and always stirring until a ball is homogeneous and it comes off the pot.
Retire do lume, coloque numa bancada, amasse e divida a massa em dois.
Extend half the dough on a flour-sprinkled bench until it is fine.

Have spoonfuls of the filling on top, fold the dough and cut it with a slice or with the help of a glass. Repeat the operation with the rest of the dough, then pass the rissols by the beaten eggs and by grated bread.
Place the rissols in the air fryer at 180° for 15 minutes. In the middle of time, open and turn the giggles so that they are golden on both sides.

pea-salad-without-bacon.name: Pea Salad Without Bacon
instructions: Combine peas, onion, Cheddar cheese, egg, garlic powder, salt, pepper, and paprika in a bowl. Add enough creamy salad dressing so that the mixture is coated thoroughly.

peach-box-cobbler.name: Peach 'box' Cobbler
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190°C).
In a 9x18 inch (23x36 cm) glass baking dish, spread the peaches and syrup.
Evenly sprinkle the cake mix over the peaches, and pat down.
Lay the butter evenly over the cake mix.
Bake for 45 minutes.
Top with vanilla ice cream (optional).
Enjoy!

peach-bellini.name: Peach Bellini
instructions: Pour peach puree into a fluted glass; top with Prosecco or Champagne.
Garnish with a slice of peach. Enjoy!

peach-chocolate-tart-lezzet.name: Peach Chocolate Tart
instructions: 1. Whale Hüner small.
2. Take the flour dough kneading mold.
3. Open the middle like the pool and preparation of a mixed dough with cocoa, nuts, salt, Hüner and half glass of powder sugar.
4. Add eggs and milk and knead until you get a uniform mixture.
5. Wrap the dough in the ball shape and wrap it in the stretch foil and leave 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
6.  Open half-century thickness with roll.
7. Do not lubricate the weighing mold of 24 cm and press the dough bottom and edges.
8. Cover over aluminum paper and add 1 palm of dry beans.
9. Bake for 30 minutes in the oven with a pre-heated 180 degrees.
10. Leave the mold from the mold to cool.
11. 11. Peel and slice the peaches.
12. Take a lemon juice on it to not be decided.
12. August Take a rough to crush 2 spoon milk cream and cocoa nuts.
14 July Place it into a full container of water and melt constantly stirring in jealous fire.
15. Place the cream you prepared on the cold tart and lay the peach slices.
16. Eat 100 gr of chocolate in a rough little.
17. September Add and mix the remaining milk cream, melt with mymarigeny.
18. Fine flux on peaches.
19. September 300 gr of chocolate is released in 5-6 cm width and 15 cm long by pouring on the oily paper with bananas.
20. Take a refrigerator and freeze.
21. Make wave-shaped folds by removing the paper with a large-mouth spatula from the cabinet and place it on the weighing.
22. Serve and serve.

peach-jam-argiro.name: Peach Jam
instructions: Choose ripe and firm fruits that do not have melted spots or spots on their skin.
We wash them very well and then peel them off.
Cut the peaches into pieces by collecting in a glass bowl their running juices.
Add peaches and sugar layers to the bowl until the ingredients are finished.
Enter one lemon peel.
Cover the bowl and leave it in the refrigerator one night to melt the sugar and become syrup until the next day.
Add the peach jam to a pot with a thick base.
Put it on high heat and bottle 15-20′, counting the time from the time it boilers.
Remove any foam formed on its surface.
Let the peach jam cool.
When she gets completely cold, we tie her up.
Add it back into the fire and boil for another 10 minutes, stirring with a wooden spoon.
We always count the boiling time from the time it boils.
At the end of the boil, add the lemon juice and let it boil for 3-4 minutes.
Like she's hot, we hand her out to hot sterile dry jars. We're gonna need six jars of 350 grams.
Fill up and seal with sterile caps as well.
Turn over the jars with the lid on the counter and let them decompress until completely cold.
Then we keep them in a locker dark and cool all year round.
When we open a jar of jam, keep it in the refrigerator for a long time.

peach-porridge-for-babies-pequerecetas.name: Peach Porridge For Babies

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon lemon juice (optional, to avoid oxidation if saved)

instructions: We peel the peaches and get their bone. If they're old and mature, their skin's about alone.
We cut his pulp into medium pieces and put them in a small bowl. We add a water chorrit if we want a lighter texture (especially at the beginning of supplementary feeding).
Let's cook with medium heat for about 5-7 minutes, till they're very soft. If the peaches have been grown up, we'll have to heat up a few minutes.

We withdraw from the fire and let them tempt a little before shredding. We cross with a mixer till a smooth and smooth texture remains. If necessary, we add more water to suit consistency. We can have some lemon juice droplets if we're not gonna give them at the moment and we're trying to get them out so fast.

peach-sangria.name: Peach Sangria
instructions: Place peaches, water, sugar, and cinnamon in a blender or the bowl of a food processor; blend until smooth. Transfer mixture to a pitcher; stir in dry white wine and triple sec. Cover the pitcher; chill in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
Strain peach mixture through a large cheesecloth-lined sieve; squeeze cloth to extrude all juice. Pour juice into a large pitcher; stir in sparkling wine.

peaches-in-wine-recipe-comedera.name: Peaches In Wine Recipe
instructions: Pelamos los melocotones y los abrimos por la base con la punta de un cuchillo y quitamos los huesos.
We open up the vanilla branch lengthwise, we remove the seeds and we put branch and seeds into a casserole with wine, cinnamon stick, orange cuts and sugar.
We have been boiling, we have added pitted and boned peaches and we have been cooking for 20 minutes under low heat.
Escurrimos los melocotones y reservamos.
We put up the cauldron to remove the vanilla and cinnamon, put it back into the casserole and heat up with medium heat to reduce its volume by half and get an syrup texture.
Introducimos los melocotones en la cazuela, retiramos del fuego y dejamos enfriar del todo.
We have the peaches and we have them with them and we have them with the cuts of orange and the cinnamon stick and the reduced syrup.

pear-pie-with-red-wine-and-rosemary.name: Pear Pie With Red Wine And Rosemary

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for dusting
Firm but ripe pears (such as comice

instructions: Pulse granulated sugar, salt, and 3 cups flour in a food processor to combine. Add butter and shortening and pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal with a few pea-size pieces of butter remaining. Transfer to a large bowl.

Whisk egg yolks, vinegar, and ½ cup ice water in a small bowl. Drizzle half of egg mixture over flour mixture and, using a fork, mix gently just until combined. Add remaining egg mixture and mix until dough just comes together (you will have some unincorporated pieces).

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface, flatten slightly, and cut into quarters. Stack pieces on top of one another, placing unincorporated dry pieces of dough between layers, and press down to combine. Repeat process twice more (all pieces of dough should be incorporated at this point). Form dough into two 1”-thick disks. Wrap in plastic; chill at least 1 hour.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 3 months.

Bring granulated sugar, rosemary, and 1½ cups wine to a boil; cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced to about ⅔ cup, 5–8 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl. Whisking constantly, gradually add butter and whisk until syrup is smooth.

Whisk cornstarch, cinnamon, 5 tsp. flour, and remaining ¼ cup wine in a small saucepan set over medium heat; cook, whisking constantly, until thickened, about 1 minute. Slowly add syrup, whisking until smooth, then stir in vanilla and salt. Chill until cool, about 30 minutes.

Place a rack in lower third of oven and preheat to 375°. Toss pears and red wine syrup in a large bowl. Roll out 1 disk of dough on a lightly floured surface into a 14” round. Transfer to a 9” pie dish. Lift up edges and allow dough to slump down into dish. Trim, leaving about 1” overhang. Pour filling into crust and chill.

Meanwhile, roll out remaining disk of dough into a 14” round. Using a pizza cutter or a sharp knife, cut into twelve 1”-wide strips. Arrange 6 strips crosswise across top of pie, spacing about 1” apart.

Arrange remaining 6 strips lengthwise across top of pie, lifting crosswise strips and weaving lengthwise strips over and under to form a lattice. Brush edge of dough with beaten egg and press ends of strips and bottom crust together to seal. Trim strips to same length as bottom crust, then fold bottom crust over lattice strips; crimp edge. Brush crust with beaten egg and sprinkle with granulated sugar. Chill in freezer 15 minutes.

Place pie dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake 30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°, rotate pie, and continue baking, tenting with foil if crust is browning too quickly, until juices are bubbling and crust is golden brown, 60–75 minutes longer. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool at least 4 hours before slicing.
DO AHEAD: Pie can be baked 1 day ahead. Store wrapped tightly at room temperature.

pear-wedges-with-prosciutto-and-mint.name: Pear Wedges With Prosciutto And Mint

ingredients.prep: halved, cored, each half cut into 6 wedges

instructions: Mix oil, nectar, vinegar, and aniseed in small bowl; stir in 1 tablespoon mint. Season to taste with salt. Arrange pear wedges on plates; drizzle vinaigrette over. Top with prosciutto. Sprinkle with cracked black pepper and remaining 1 tablespoon mint.

penne-with-pancetta-sage-and-mushrooms.name: Penne With Pancetta, Sage, And Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring broth and wine to a boil in a medium heavy saucepan over medium-high heat and cook until reduced to 1 cup, 15–18 minutes. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large deep skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms; season with salt and pepper. Sauté until tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer mushrooms to a plate. Add remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and pancetta to same skillet. Sauté until pancetta begins to brown, about 10 minutes. Add wine reduction, butter, and herbs; simmer until liquid thickens slightly, about 3 minutes. Stir in mushrooms. Season sauce to taste with salt and pepper.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until almost tender but still firm to the bite. Drain pasta, reserving 1/2 cup cooking liquid.

Stir pasta and 1/2 cup cheese into mushroom mixture. Stir over medium-high heat, adding water by tablespoonfuls if dry, until pasta is al dente and sauce thickens and clings to pasta, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a large bowl. Sprinkle 1/2 cup cheese over.

perfectly-spiced-pumpkin-cake.name: Perfectly Spiced Pumpkin Cake

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Position a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Lightly coat an 8x8" square metal baking pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray and line with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on all sides. Whisk 1¼ cups (156 g) all-purpose flour, ½ cup (63 g) whole wheat flour, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. ground cinnamon, 1 tsp. ground ginger, ¼ tsp. ground allspice, a pinch of ground cloves, and a pinch of ground nutmeg in a large bowl.

Whisk 2 large eggs, room temperature, 1¼ cups (packed; 250 g) dark brown sugar, 1 cup pure pumpkin purée, and ½ cup (1 stick ) unsalted butter, melted, in a second large bowl until smooth. Mix in dry ingredients. Scrape batter into prepared pan and smooth top.

Bake cake until edges begin to pull away from sides of pan and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 30–35 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan 20 minutes. Using parchment, lift cake and transfer to a cutting board. Let cool completely.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat 4 oz. cream cheese, room temperature, and 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, in a medium bowl just to combine. Reduce speed to low and gradually beat in ⅔ cup (73 g) powdered sugar, sifted, then a pinch of kosher salt until smooth. Spread frosting over top of cooled cake.
Editor’s note: This pumpkin cake recipe was first printed online in October 2014 as “Pumpkin Cake With Maple Cream Cheese Frosting.” It has been updated to adjust the spicing and sugar level, and to remove the maple syrup from the frosting—if you’re missing the maple flavor, serve slices with a drizzle of maple syrup to finish. Head this way for more of our favorite recipes with pumpkin purée →

pesto-parmesan-avocado-toast.name: Pesto & Parmesan Avocado Toast
instructions: Spread pesto on toast.
Top with sliced avocado and shaved parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

pickled-onions.name: Pickled Onions
instructions:
Whisk first 3 ingredients and 1 cup water in a small bowl until sugar and salt dissolve. Place onion in a jar; pour vinegar mixture over. Let sit at room temperature for 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill. Drain onions before using.
Editor’s note: This recipe was originally published in our June 2012 issue and first appeared online in May 2012. Head this way for more of our favorite red onion recipes →

pine-nut-and-bean-dip.name: Pine Nut And Bean Dip
instructions: Set a mesh sieve over a small bowl.
Heat a small saucepan over medium-low heat.
Combine pine nuts and oil in the pan and cook, swirling often, until the nuts are golden brown, about 5 minutes. (Cut 1 in half to check doneness in the center.)
Scrape the nuts and oil into the sieve and let the oil drain into the bowl.
Transfer the drained pine nuts to paper towels to drain further.
Finely grate the garlic clove into the drained oil in the bowl.
In a blender, combine the cannellini beans, kosher salt, black pepper, three-fourths of the drained pine nuts, and ½ cup water. Blend until very smooth.
With the blender motor running, gradually stream in the garlic-infused oil; blend until fully combined.
Transfer the dip to a small serving bowl.
Spoon the remaining pine nuts over the dip.
The dip can be made up to 2 days ahead.
If preparing ahead, cover and chill the dip in the refrigerator.
Before serving, allow the chilled dip to come to room temperature.

pineapple-glazed-chicken-with-jalapeno-s.name: Pineapple-glazed Chicken With Jalapeño Salsa

ingredients.item: Boneless chicken breast halves with skin

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Bring pineapple juice, brown sugar, and mustard to boil in small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Boil until glaze has thickened slightly, about 1 minute. Season with salt and pepper.

Mix pineapple, red pepper, cilantro, onion, and chiles in medium bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Line baking sheet with foil. Place chicken on sheet and brush with glaze. Bake 15 minutes. Brush again with glaze, then broil until cooked through and golden, watching closely to avoid burning, about 5 minutes longer. Let rest 5 minutes.
Spoon salsa over chicken and serve.

pitalets-with-potatoes-and-rosemary-lezz.name: Pitalets With Potatoes And Rosemary
instructions: 1. Peel the shells of potatoes and rub it until it is softened by adding water until it passes.
2. In the form of a cube, roast the chopped olive oil until pink.
3. Add cube chopped pepper and soak for 2-3 minutes.
4. Mix the boiled potatoes, salt, pepper, pepper and chopped pepper with addition to the leaf.
5. Leave it from January and cool.
6. Mix butter, yogurt, salt, milk, sunflower oil and eggs in a wide container.
7. Prepare a soft dough that does not add flour and baking powder and does not address.
8. Cover over 30 minutes.
9. Open from the dough with the roller on the ground, which is laid out.

pizza-bianca-with-scamorza-and-shaved-ce.name: Pizza Bianca With Scamorza And Shaved Celery Root

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 500°. Toss celery root and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt and pepper. Set aside.

Gently stretch dough into a 16x12” oval and transfer to a lightly oiled rimmed baking sheet. (If dough springs back, cover and let rest 10 minutes, then stretch again, resting as needed.) Brush with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil and bake until dry and golden, about 5 minutes (this prevents dough from getting soggy once the toppings are added). Remove from oven; top with cheese, reserved celery root, onion, Parmesan, and 1 Tbsp. oregano.

Bake pizza, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until cheese is melted, celery root is tender, and crust is golden brown, 12–15 minutes. Top with capers and more oregano; season with sea salt and pepper.

pizza-with-salami-and-feta-argiro.name: Pizza With Salami And Feta

ingredients.item: 1 large sheet of pizza dough (ready or homemade)
Few leaves of fresh herbs (ring and basil)
A little cornmeal for the baking pan
1 large sheet of pizza dough (ready or homemade)
Few leaves of fresh herbs (ring and basil)
A little cornmeal for the baking pan

instructions: Lubricate lightly or sprinkle a large thin baking pan with some cornice.
Add the ready pizza dough.
With the fingers stretch the pizza dough to reach the whole surface of the baking pan and become very thin.
With a spoon, spread the dense tomato sauce all over the surface of our pizza.
Add the salami, olive slices and sprinkle with the feta flakes.
Sprinkle with oregano and sprinkle with a few drops of olive oil.
Preheat the evening to 2003 We'll make on the bottom grill of the evening.
Place the pizza in the hot oven and bake without opening and closing for about 25 minutes until the pizza is cooked properly below.
Once the pizza comes out of the oven, add the fresh basil leaves and serve immediately.

ingredients.item: 300 gr spinach (or blue, greenery like cabbage)
1 tablespoon of delicate sour (or lemon juice)

2. Then the fine coast.
3. Light onions in olive oil and leave to cool.
4. Mix hazelnut spinach in a large bowl, in-house, garlic, onion, delicate sour, taste and parsley.
5. Add olive oil to the mixture and knead thoroughly.
6. Place the mixture in the serving plate by providing small balls or round shapes.
7. Pure fortune with delicate grains and parsley.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

poached-pear-salad-with-blue-cheese-and-.name: Poached Pear Salad With Blue Cheese And Champagne Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Bring first 5 ingredients to boil in large wide saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Add pear halves, cut side down. Return syrup to boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer uncovered until pears are tender, 20 to 25 minutes. Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Drain pears. Leaving top 1 inch intact (at narrow end), cut each pear half lengthwise into thin slices. Gently press on pear halves to fan slightly.
Whisk shallot, vinegar, and mustard in small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in 1/2 cup oil. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.

Place greens in large bowl. Toss with enough vinaigrette to coat. Mound greens on plates. Arrange 1 pear half atop greens on each plate. Sprinkle with walnuts and cheese. Drizzle with more vinaigrette, if desired, and serve.

poblano-chicken-cheese-soup.name: Poblano Chicken Cheese Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Roast poblano peppers over an open flame on a gas stove or grill until all sides are charred, 5 to 8 minutes. Place blackened peppers into a bowl and cover tightly with plastic wrap. Allow peppers to steam as they cool, about 20 minutes. Remove and discard skins.
Combine chicken broth, cream cheese, Cheddar and Monterey Jack cheeses, and salsa verde in a blender. Blend until smooth.
Peel cooled poblano peppers and remove seeds. Finely chop peppers in a food processor.

Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, and cumin. Cook and stir until slightly browned, 3 to 5 minutes. Add poblanos and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes. Add chicken and sauté for 2 minutes more.
Pour cheese mixture into a stockpot over low heat. Add chicken mixture and bring to a simmer. Cook until heated through, at least 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.

pomegranate-grenadine.name: Pomegranate Grenadine
instructions: Combine 3 cups pomegranate juice and sugar together in a saucepan; heat to 118°C (118 degrees C) or until a small amount of mixture dropped into cold water forms a firm ball. Remove saucepan from heat and cover with a lid; let cool until pan is cool enough to touch. Stir remaining 1 cup pomegranate juice into mixture. Refrigerate.

pomegranate-mousse-in-puff-pastry-basket.name: Pomegranate Mousse In Puff Pastry Baskets
instructions: 1. Set oven to 180 degrees.
2. Oil paper cool on the oven tray.
3. Cut the ruby dough with the mouth part of the cup.
4. Roll the half of the round dough you cut with the mouth part of the tea cup and create rings.
5. Paste these rings on large round dough.
6. Pre-heated 180 degree cook until the oven is rough and fried.
7. Remove from the oven and wait for cooling.
8. Let the white chocolate melt with mymarijuana and spoil it.
9. Cook the cream with mixer until the light consistency area.
10. Add chocolate to cream and mix it with spatula.
11. 11. Fill in the blush baskets.
12. Share the pomegranate grains to them.
12. August Serve.

pomegranate-parsley-tabbouleh.name: Pomegranate-parsley Tabbouleh

ingredients.prep: leaves and tender stems very coarsely chopped (about 1 0.5 cups)
fronds torn, bulb and stalks thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Sumac can be found at middle eastern markets

instructions: Cook freekeh in a large pot of boiling salted water until al dente, 20–30 minutes. Drain and spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; season with kosher salt and pepper while still warm. Let cool.
Meanwhile, whisk together shallot, chile, ginger, oil, lime juice, maple syrup, and 2 tsp. sumac. Taste dressing and season with kosher salt. Let sit 10 minutes.

Cut pomegranates in half. Working over a large bowl, hold a pomegranate half cut side down in your palm with your fingers stretched wide. Use a wooden spoon to forcefully and repeatedly smack pomegranate skin, which will send the seeds raining down into the bowl. Repeat with remaining pomegranate. Fill bowl with cold water to cover seeds. Skim off any little bits of pith that float to the surface; drain seeds and shake off excess liquid.

Toss parsley, fennel, fennel fronds, and mint in a large bowl. Add freekeh, season with kosher salt, and toss gently to combine. Add dressing and toss with your hands to thoroughly coat ingredients. Add pomegranate seeds and toss gently to disperse. Sprinkle with sea salt and more sumac.
Do Ahead: Freekeh can be cooked 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

pontic-vultures-argiro.name: Pontic Vultures

ingredients.item: A few drops of vinegar or lemon
A little extra flour for opening the leaf
A few drops of vinegar or lemon

Add the ingredients in a bowl, flour, oil, acidic lemon or vinegar, yeast and mix.

We flour the hands and knead the dough for a few minutes on the counter, make it elastic and not stick to the hands.
Place in a slightly oiled bowl.

On a floured surface, spread the dough into a thin leaf.

Add the cheese or potato filling and close the pie on a half moon.
Press the edges with a fork to seal the filling.
With the fork, gently pierce the surface into the pitch, remove the moisture and inflate evenly.
After finishing with all the pitches, fry for 3 to 4 minutes in medium heat until golden.
We put them on absorbent paper to drain.
We can also cook the peas in the oven.
Put them in a baking pan lined with parchment paper.
Brush them with olive oil and bake them for 25 minutes at approximately 180.3.3. in the air until they are inflatable and golden.

poppy-seed-biscuit-lezzet.name: Poppy Seed Biscuit
instructions: 1. Un blend salt and powder sugar in large bowl until a handle.
2. In addition to the remaining material and knead the dough with a hard consistency.
3. Take the dough into the lightly unified countertop u and fine hungry with the help of a roller.

8. Serve cold.

pork-and-asparagus-stir-fry.name: Pork And Asparagus Stir-fry

ingredients.prep: trimmed, cut on a diagonal into 1"–2" pieces
white and pale green parts only, finely chopped

ingredients.item: . shaoxing wine (chinese rice wine) or medium-dry sherry

instructions: Heat 1 tsp. peanut oil in a large skillet over high. Once pan is hot (oil will be lightly smoking), add half of asparagus and a couple pinches of salt and cook, tossing only once or twice so the pieces have a chance to blister, until crisp-tender and lightly browned, about 4 minutes. Transfer asparagus to a plate. Add 1 tsp. peanut oil to skillet (no need to wipe it out) and repeat process with remaining asparagus.

Reduce heat to medium-high; add remaining 1 tsp. peanut oil to skillet, then add pork, spreading out into an even layer. Season with a couple pinches of salt and cook, undisturbed, until meat begins to brown underneath, about 2 minutes. Break up meat with a wooden spoon and add scallions, garlic, and ginger. Cook, stirring, until pork is crisp and mixture is very fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add wine and soy sauce and return asparagus to skillet. Cook, turning to coat with pork mixture, until heated through, about 1 minute.
Transfer stir-fry to a platter or large shallow bowl and drizzle with sesame oil. Serve with rice and chili crisp.

pork-lemonade-argiro.name: Pork Lemonade

ingredients.item: 1 kg pig thigh or split (cut into small portions)
1 kg pig thigh or split (cut into small portions)

instructions: Cut the meat first into small portions, or large bites.
Heat the olive oil in medium pot and sauce the meat for 5-6 minutes, around and around, to brown.
Add the chopped onion, broken garlic and let them become transparent for 3-4 minutes.
Wipe the meat with the wine and allow it to evaporate by half.
Add the carrots whole and the leeks cut into thick pieces.
Fill in hot water until the meat is half covered.
Add the beans and spices to a tulpan.
Cover the meat and let it boil until it softens and becomes a loukoumi.
When the meat softens, add salt, pepper, oregano and lemon juice.
Allow it to boil for a few minutes and thicken.
Read the secrets to cook each piece of pork properly

pork-with-vegetables-in-the-pot-argiro.name: Pork With Vegetables In The Pot

ingredients.item: 800 greaves cut into bites (neck or spatter)
800 greaves cut into bites (neck or spatter)

instructions: Heat the olive oil first in a plate pot and add the meat around.
Add the chopped onions, potatoes, carrots and mix for 4'-5' until the onion withers.
Add the wine.
Add the tomatoes, peas, salt, pepper and simmer for about 50 minutes until the meat softens.
Then we add the herbs.
Mix and serve.
Read all the secrets to cook each piece of pork properly.

portuguese-custard-tarts.name: Portuguese Custard Tarts
instructions: Preheat oven to 220°C (218°C).
In a small pan, place the sugar, water, and cinnamon stick. Simmer for 3 minutes and set aside.
Combine milk and cream in a saucepan and place over a medium heat. Bring mixture to a boil, then remove from the heat and set aside.
To a large bowl, add the egg yolks, whole egg, vanilla extract, and corn flour. Whisk until fully combined and no lumps remain.
Temper the egg mixture by introducing the hot milk and cream in two 100 milliliter batches, then whisk.
Return mixture to the saucepan and place over a low-medium heat. Whisk continually until mixture thickens. Turn off heat.
Remove cinnamon stick from the syrup and slowly trickle into the custard, whisking continually.
Lightly flour a work surface and cut puff pastry into 12 equal pieces.
To a lightly greased muffin tin, push each piece of puff pastry down and up into the sides of the muffin holes until evenly distributed.
Pour custard into each muffin tin so each one is three quarters full. Bake for 16-20 minutes until golden and brown.
Serve warm with a dusting of icing sugar and a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Enjoy!

posole-with-red-chile.name: Posole With Red Chile

ingredients.prep: fresh cilantro, and white onion; thinly sliced cabbage, jalapeños, and radishes; lime wedges

instructions: New Mexico chiles are sold at Latin markets, specialty foods stores, and some supermarkets. Look for dried hominy at natural foods stores.
Preheat oven to 400°. Rinse and dry chiles; place in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and roast, turning occasionally, until puffed, fragrant, and a slightly darker red, 5–6 minutes. Let cool.

Wearing gloves, use scissors to stem and halve chiles lengthwise. Discard seeds for less heat. Transfer to a medium saucepan and cover with 6 cups water. Add onion and garlic; season with salt. Bring to a simmer. Cook until chiles are soft, 25–30 minutes.

Drain chile mixture, reserving liquid. Purée mixture and 1½ cups liquid in a blender until smooth, adding more liquid if needed for a sauce that can coat a spoon. Strain through a medium-mesh sieve into a medium bowl.
DO AHEAD: Purée can be made 5 days ahead. Cover; chill.
Season pork shoulder and ham hocks with 1 Tbsp. salt. Rub garlic, chili powder, and cumin all over pork; set aside. Pork can be marinated 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Drain hominy. Transfer to a large heavy pot; add 12 cups water. Stud each onion with 1 clove; add to pot with 2 Tbsp. salt and bay leaves. Cover; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered and stirring often, until hominy begins to soften, about 1 hour (hominy takes longer to cook than pork, so give it a jump start).

Add pork shoulder and ham hocks to hominy; pour in water to cover by 1”. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally and adding more water as needed to keep ingredients submerged, until hominy is tender and pork is very tender and falling apart, 2–2½ hours. Remove onions, bay leaves, and hocks. Discard onions and let hocks cool slightly; pick meat from bones and discard any cartilage, skin, and fat. Return meat to pot and stir in ¾ cup red chile purée. Season to taste with salt and more red chile purée, if desired.
Divide posole among bowls. Serve with remaining red chile purée and garnishes.

potato-scones.name: Potato Scones
instructions: Mash potatoes with flour, butter, and salt in a large bowl until a stiff dough forms.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface. Knead dough lightly and roll dough out to a 1/2-inch-thick circle. Cut into 6 equal wedges.
Working in batches, cook scones on the hot griddle until golden brown, 4 to 5 minutes per side.

pounded-flank-steak-with-salsa.name: Pounded Flank Steak With Salsa
instructions: Toss zucchini, vinegar, chopped oregano, and ¼ cup oil in a medium bowl to combine; season zucchini salsa with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Prepare a grill for high heat. Meanwhile, flatten your steak. Cover a cutting board with a long piece of plastic wrap and set steak on top; fold plastic over steak to cover. Using the smooth side of a meat mallet, pound steak to about ½" thick. (Don’t hold back; you want it good and roughed up.) Pat steak dry with paper towels; season generously with salt and rub a bit of oil all over. Grill until browned, about 2 minutes per side for medium-rare. (You might not get that much color on this steak because it’s so thin, but you don’t want it to be overcooked.) Transfer steak to a cutting board and let rest 5–10 minutes. Cut in half lengthwise with the grain, then slice thinly against the grain.
Arrange steak on a platter and spoon half of reserved salsa along with some juices over steak. Top with oregano leaves. Serve remaining salsa alongside.
Do Ahead: Zucchini salsa can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

practical-chicken-rice-recipe-lezzet.name: Practical Chicken Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: Chicken can use chicken but or baget instead; it is softer and tasty.
A hindili or dana meat version can also be made instead of chicken.
You can get different flavors by prefering honeydo, ottoman or jasmin rice instead of normal white rice.
You can prepare a more healthy alternative to findgur or kinoa.
Instead of butter, you can use olive oil, coconut oil or margarine.
When roasting the back, it makes a fraction of the oil to change with chicken water to be lighter.
Apart from salt and pepper, you can create different flavors by adding cake, pepper, garlic powder, bay leaf or kimyon.
You can flavor the rice with lemon juice or orange peel grater.
It will add a different taste to use vegetable juice or broth instead of chicken water.
A lighter rice can only use water; in this case it is necessary to increase the spices a little.

Then we'll care about the shrimp. If they are for some reason unfurled, this is the right time to remove their shells. We also need them to be cooked. If you have only obtained raw shrimp, you can cook them in water quickly or spend them five minutes with the plate (make sure they are cooked from both sides).
We select the most beautiful prawns to decorate the cocktails and cut them into pieces.

Para continuar, calcularemos la mitad de la salsa rosa y la distribuiremos en una capa al fondo de las copas.

We will now repeat the process with the rest of salsa, creating a third layer at each cocktail and finally we will distribute what remains of the shrimp and pineapple pieces.
Once we have our cups, we'll get them lettuce leaves. We'll wash them and disinfect them very well. Then we'll scold them, and we'll get them into tapes and we'll use them to cut our cocktail cups.
Finalmente, decoraremos cada copa con las gambas que hemos reservado al principio de la receta.

2 cds of brown sugar (you can suit your taste)

1  pizca de ralladura de naranja (opcional, para aromatizar)

instructions: Put the red fruit into a small pot with medium heat.
Add brown sugar, honey, lemon juice, orange and vanilla.
Add a tablespoon of water or red wine (as you prefer a more classic or gourmet touch).
Cocina durante 8 a 10 minutos, removiendo ocasionalmente con una cuchara de madera para evitar que se pegue.

instructions: Descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho, pique-os finamente e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite. Junte os espinafres, tempere com sal e deixe saltear. Retire do lume e deixe arrefecer. De seguida, adicione o queijo creme e misture bem.
Cut the dough into 8 rectangles, divide by them the previous preparation and brush all around with the yolk, previously mixed with milk. Close the rectangles and twist the ends like candy.

Brush over with the remaining yolk and place on a tray, lined with vegetable paper. Bring it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 20 minutes, or until the dough is golden. Take it off, let it cool down a bit and serve.

puff-pastry-apple-pie.name: Puff Pastry Apple Pie
instructions: In a bowl, mix apples with salt and half a lemon. Then, slice thinly and place in a pan. Add butter on medium heat and stir, allowing butter to melt and apples to caramelize.
Once caramelized, add apples back to a bowl and add cinnamon, brown sugar, and the juice of the other half of the lemon. Mix gently, then marinate apples for 30 minutes, mixing every 5 minutes.

Place a spoonful or two of the apple mixture in a puff pastry sheet and fold/shape as desired. Before placing in the oven, mix egg yolks with milk and brush mixture atop puff pastry sheet, sprinkling with a little white sugar on top as desired.
Bake at 360 °C for about 10 minutes, then broil on high heat for 2-3 minutes.
Serve warm.

pull-apart-stuffed-pasta-ring.name: Pull-apart Stuffed Pasta Ring
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
Mix all the ricotta, mozzarella, Parmesan, oregano, garlic, basil, chili flakes (optional), salt, and pepper until smooth.
Unfold a jumbo shell, turning it inside out, and gently fill it with 1-2 tablespoons of the cheese mixture. Refold the shell and set aside. Repeat with the rest of the pasta shells.
In a circular dish, place a layer of marinara sauce that completely covers the bottom of the pan. Place the shells, cheese side up in the pan in a spiralling pattern.
Pour a little extra marinara sauce within the spiral and top the whole pan with mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the sauce is bubbling and the cheese is a golden brown.
Pull apart with your fingers.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-seed-brittle.name: Pumpkin Seed Brittle
instructions: A candy thermometer

Spray a parchment-lined baking sheet with nonstick spray; set aside. Bring sugar, corn syrup, and 3 Tbsp. water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Fit saucepan with thermometer and cook until thermometer registers 290°, 3–4 minutes.
Stir in pumpkin seeds, butter, and kosher salt and cook, stirring often, until pale brown and thermometer registers 305°, 3–4 minutes.

Stir in baking soda and cinnamon (mixture will bubble vigorously), then immediately pour caramel onto prepared sheet. Using a heatproof spatula, quickly spread out and sprinkle with sea salt; let cool. Break brittle into pieces.
DO AHEAD: Brittle can be made 1 week ahead. Store airtight, layered between sheets of parchment paper, at room temperature.

7. Mix yogurt and flour in a separate container until it gets a smooth consistency.
8. Take 1 bucket from the soup water and add it to the mixture and cook well.
9. Add the prepared yogurt mixture slowly into the soup, stirring constantly.
10. Boil for 3 minutes and shoot.

pumpkin-spice-coffee-cake.name: Pumpkin Spice Coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray a 10-inch fluted tube pan (such as Bundt®) with cooking spray. Coat with cinnamon sugar.
Beat sugar and butter together in a large bowl using an electric mixer until fluffy. Add eggs, blending 1 at a time. Add pumpkin pie spice and vanilla extract and combine.
Mix flour, baking powder, and baking soda together in a separate bowl. Alternate adding flour mixture and sour cream to egg mixture a little at a time, starting and ending with flour mixture.
Mix brown sugar and cinnamon together for topping in a small bowl. Pour 1/3 of the cake mixture into the prepared pan. Top with 1/2 of the brown sugar mixture. Repeat once more.
Bake in the preheated oven for 8 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Continue baking until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before transferring to a plate.
